# This directory stores serialized scikit-learn model artifacts.
# Files:
#   score_predictor.joblib    — GradientBoostingRegressor (exam score 0-100)
#   pass_classifier.joblib    — RandomForestClassifier (pass/fail binary)
#   feature_importances.json  — Feature importance rankings from both models
#
# These files are generated by running: python -m ml.train
# Do NOT commit .joblib files to version control (add to .gitignore).
